subsystems.name: relationship_engine_core
subsystems.why: Deterministic bounded axis update and truth-boundary rejection behavior are explicitly covered by dedicated tests and passed.
subsystems.residualRisk: Low risk of inconsistency; moderate change pressure only if event taxonomy expands rapidly.

subsystems.name: relationship_progression_reader_bonding
subsystems.why: Canonical and reader-bond progression paths remain isolated with durable repeated-update verification.
subsystems.residualRisk: Medium-low long-horizon payload-shape growth risk in JSON envelope fields.

subsystems.name: consequence_engine
subsystems.why: Observed trigger anchoring, deterministic mapping, lifecycle behavior, and propagation basics are verified and green.
subsystems.residualRisk: Medium-low mapping drift risk as category/event surface grows.

subsystems.name: memory_activation_engine
subsystems.why: Source restrictions, bounded activation output, deterministic scoring, and leakage checks are all covered and passing.
subsystems.residualRisk: Medium-low regression risk if new source types are added without parallel boundary tests.

subsystems.name: emotional_continuity_integration
subsystems.why: Structural integration and mode/channel boundaries are verified and currently stable.
subsystems.residualRisk: Medium composition risk as additional pressure inputs are introduced.

subsystems.name: temporal_evolution_layer
subsystems.why: Elapsed-trigger gating and non-continuous bounded drift behavior are directly tested and passing.
subsystems.residualRisk: Medium-low if new trigger kinds are introduced without threshold governance.

subsystems.name: emergence_orchestrator
subsystems.why: Bundle determinism, boundedness, mode safety, and debug-path control are all tested in dedicated orchestration verification.
subsystems.residualRisk: Medium-low seam evolution risk where additional surfaces are wired in.

subsystems.name: emergence_verification_surface
subsystems.why: Chunk 8 command normalization and umbrella emergence verification are integrated into strict full-system flow and passing.
subsystems.residualRisk: Low ownership risk if command composition is maintained with future subsystem changes.

subsystems.name: truth_boundary_safety_across_emergence_paths
subsystems.why: Interaction truth firewall and channel/mode boundary checks remain green in strict certification matrix.
subsystems.residualRisk: Low residual risk; boundary regressions would likely surface quickly through current verification commands.

subsystems.name: contract_governance_for_emergence_payloads
subsystems.why: Core contract governance checks pass; emergence bundle remains an internal orchestration artifact rather than an externally governed payload contract.
subsystems.residualRisk: Medium non-blocking risk if bundle is later externalized without contract registration and drift checks.
